title: Turtles Swim Faster Than Expected
overview: Suzume Katagura, a bored housewife, spends her days doing chores and taking care of her husband's pet turtle. One day, she sees a wanted ad for spies. Hoping for some excitement in her life, she decides to give them a call.

trailers.title: Turtles are Surprisingly Fast Swimmers (亀は意外と速く泳ぐ - Miki Satoshi, 2005) Trailer
